response.justification: Despite extensive software engineering experience, the candidate lacks relevant Java-focused project work, has only basic German language proficiency (a hard requirement), and holds senior-level roles that far exceed the junior entry-level scope, raising concerns about fit, salary expectations, and willingness to operate as a junior contributor.
strengths: Extensive full-stack development experience across multiple languages and platforms
Strong contributions to open-source and community-driven tech initiatives
Demonstrated expertise in agile practices, CI/CD, and test-driven development
concerns: German language skills are only basic, failing to meet the required fluency
No evidence of Java usage in recent roles despite Java being a core requirement
Senior-level experience suggests overqualification and potential misalignment with junior role expectations
